title: taraxacum galeiferum
intro: Taraxacum galeiferum, also known as the upright dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum galeiferum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Taraxacum galeiferum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
